item.title: Time for the unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
greetings online friends
yeah so that is genius
bastards
order pizza whenever you want, uncle cel sez so
not sure if that's a python. maybe a ball python?
mmm hmm
aka my hero
i like how this is mostly from 1.. well, sort of
far out
torus definition. can't stand it!!!!
finally
everything is so off
not cool
stupid laundry.
we've all been there
i'm sure the scientists of Imgur will be here soon to confirm this
and balls
that's that. have a great night gang!!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: SecretHarpy's Meme Library: Volume 19
item.description:
Hello and welcome to yet another meme dump, my imgur friends. I am tired and all out of witty remarks for this one, so...onward, to memes!
Not CILANTRO MODE! I really, really hate cilantro.
Accurate and it's awful. Everything took forever as a child and now I blink and I've aged another 5 years. MAKE IT STOP
Morning people were given too much power
Just hold up I really do wanna see this lizard it looks neato HELLO LIL' LIZARD FRIEND
...yeah
Passed out drunk in a corn field somewhere, not a cell phone in sight
sus
And I love it
My dad's dead and I lost my chance to fight him. So my advice is to go fight your dad before it's too late to do so. Godspeed,
And that's all for this volume folks. Stay awesome imgur.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: This, this all day long!!!
item.description: I grew up in a house where I was resented because they were only together for me... Trust me... It's ok to break up, don't stay together for the kids, it doesn't work!

item.title: I made a cardigan!
item.description: I bought the yarn back in 2018, made a jumper I hated, ripped it out, started this cardigan… and then abandoned it for 3 years. Feels great to have finally finished it! #handmade #knitting

item.title: I literally just seemed the buttons on this new cardigan I knit. It's a little late in the year for a wool sweater but it'll be there for me on cold mornings.
item.description:
This is 100% wool so it is a little itchy but nothing I can't handle and I wanted an all natural fiber to try. We'll see how it goes.
Hope any knitter's out there enjoy.
Please enjoy a pic of my dad's new cat.
item.dc:creator: abbycrochetnerd

item.title: Humpeday Dumpetay
item.description: Dog tax!
item.dc:creator: rahbben

item.title: The AIDS Crisis: A tale of two worlds, where one world celebrated the destruction of the other world
item.description:
There were two worlds in the AIDS Crisis: 1.) those that wanted to stop it 2.) those that celebrated the disease because it was killing off everyone they didn’t like. . Most of my posts contain lengthy captions. This one won’t. They say a picture is worth a thousand words, and in this case, that’s correct. The only thing I did was include captions in the image on what was going on. Sources are cited at the end, as per usual.
I will provide context here: The AIDS quilt was a memorial and protest wrapped in one - where people would sew panels into the quilt that included the name and birth + death date of someone who died of AIDS.
This is an excerpt from my upcoming post (see my post history). I might take a week as a mental health break before finishing it. . EDIT: I’ve decided to include my first post about understanding the science behind the virus so you can keep yourself safe. HIV isn’t a death sentence anymore, but it’s still something you don’t want to catch. Link: https://imgur.com/gallery/qFnjuLe
Pictures of dying patients: https://www.life.com/history/behind-the-picture-the-photo-that-changed-the-face-of-aids/ Praise God For AIDS: https://collections.nlm.nih.gov/catalog/nlm:nlmuid-101457747-img “Got AIDS Yet?”: https://www.bu.edu/cas/magazine/spring16/aids-and-american-religion/ Another “Praise God For AIDS”: https://exhibits.library.gsu.edu/out-in-the-archives/the-power-of-protest/cobb-citizens-coalition-and-olympics-out-of-cobb/ JB Stoner Praising God For AIDS: https://album.atlantahistorycenter.com/digital/collection/southline/id/79/ Men in Hazmat Suits: https://sandiegohistory.org/journal/2019/july/lgbtq-in-san-diego-a-history-of-persecution-battles-and-triumphs/ God Hates Fags protest: https://www.flickr.com/photos/aged_accozzaglia/2147068181/ Mother Dying of AIDS: https://opendevelopmentcambodia.net/topics/priority-health-concerns/ The Early Years of the AIDS Epidemic Under the Reagan Administration: https://works.swarthmore.edu/cgi/viewcontent.cgi?article=1167&context=suhj
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: Spooky food for spooky people post + scary pancakes!
item.description:
https://onethatranaway.com/charbooterie-board/
https://www.instagram.com/p/CyPGcW_tq6Z/ very unrelated to the picture but a mummy snack for the people that have kids or are just big kids them selves!
As promised in my last post here are some scary goth ihop worthy pancakes https://valentinascorner.com/chocolate-chip-pancake-recipe/ And if you ask what in the name of a goth ihop employee is so scary about it...see the sugar content!
